content: Your card was saved successfully. Please try topping up your wallet again.

comment.text: Error text displayed on the AI paywall completion page when a wallet top-up fails after a card has been successfully saved.

usage.context: : t("AIPaywallCallbackError")} {isWalletOnly ? t("WalletTopUpCallbackErrorHint") : t("AIPaywallCallbackErrorHint")}
